moments.title: Wimbledon Starts
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships begin on June 29, two weeks of grass-court tennis at SW19

angles.name: Tennis Fever
angles.copy: The wait is almost over, Wimbledon starts in two days

angles.name: Grass Court Action
angles.copy: Get ready for two weeks of tennis action on the famous grass courts of SW19

angles.name: British Tennis
angles.copy: Will this be the year for British tennis, tune in to find out

moments.title: British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix takes place at Silverstone on July 5, round 12 of the 2026 F1 season

angles.name: F1 Action
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is just over a week away, get ready for the action

angles.name: Silverstone Speed
angles.copy: The fastest cars in the world take to the track at Silverstone on July 5

angles.name: Racing Legends
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix has a rich history, who will be the legend of 2026

moments.title: The Open Championship
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship takes place at Royal Birkdale from July 16-19

angles.name: Golfing Greats
angles.copy: The world's best golfers gather at Royal Birkdale for The Open Championship

angles.name: Links Golf
angles.copy: The Open Championship returns to the famous links course at Royal Birkdale

angles.name: Major Moment
angles.copy: The Open Championship is one of the most prestigious tournaments in golf, don't miss it
